pairs.en: Thursday, April 24, 2025 at 8 a.m. ET
pairs.zh:
2025年4月24日星期四上午8点（美国东部时间）
Thursday, April 24, 2025 at 8 a.m. ET

pairs.en: CALL PARTICIPANTS
pairs.zh: 致电参与者

pairs.en: Chief Executive Officer — Alex Peng
pairs.zh: 首席执行官 — 彭健

pairs.en: Chief Financial Officer — Jackson Ding
pairs.zh: 首席财务官 — Jackson Ding

pairs.en: Net Revenues-- $610.2 million, representing a 42.1% year-over-year increase in U.S. dollar terms (44.3% in RMB terms).
pairs.zh:
净收入——6.102亿美元，按美元计算同比增长42.1%（按人民币计算同比增长44.3%）。

Net Revenues-- $610.2 million, representing a 42.1% year-over-year increase in U.S. dollar terms (44.3% in RMB terms).

pairs.en: Gross Profit-- $317.6 million, up $39.7 million from the prior year period, with gross margin at 52% compared to 52.9% previously.
pairs.zh:
毛利润——3.176亿美元，比上年同期增加3970万美元，毛利率为52%，而此前为52.9%。

Gross Profit-- $317.6 million, up $39.7 million from the prior year period, with gross margin at 52% compared to 52.9% previously.

pairs.en: Non-GAAP Loss from Operations-- $1.7 million versus non-GAAP operating income of $9.4 million last year.
pairs.zh:
Non-GAAP营业亏损——170万美元，而去年Non-GAAP营业收入为940万美元。

Non-GAAP Loss from Operations-- $1.7 million versus non-GAAP operating income of $9.4 million last year.

pairs.en: Net Income Attributable to TAL-- $7 million on a non-GAAP basis, down from $48 million last year; $7.3 million GAAP net loss reported versus prior year's $27.5 million net income.
pairs.zh:
归属于TAL的净利润——按non-GAAP计算为700万美元，低于去年的4800万美元；报告GAAP净亏损730万美元，而去年同期净利润为2750万美元。

Net Income Attributable to TAL-- $7 million on a non-GAAP basis, down from $48 million last year; $7.3 million GAAP net loss reported versus prior year's $27.5 million net income.

pairs.en: Full-Year Net Revenues-- $2.3 billion, showing 51% year-over-year growth; non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL reached $149.5 million compared with $85.3 million previously.
pairs.zh:
全年净收入——23亿美元，同比增长51%；归属于TAL的非GAAP净利润达到1.495亿美元，而此前为8530万美元。  
Full-Year Net Revenues-- $2.3 billion, showing 51% year-over-year growth; non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL reached $149.5 million compared with $85.3 million previously.

pairs.en: Cash and Short-Term Investments-- $3.2 billion as of February 28, 2025, comprising $1.77 billion in cash and cash equivalents, $1.85 billion in short-term investments, and $220.5 million in restricted cash.
pairs.zh:
现金和短期投资——截至2025年2月28日为32亿美元，包括17.7亿美元的现金及现金等价物、18.5亿美元的短期投资以及2.205亿美元的受限现金。

Cash and Short-Term Investments-- $3.2 billion as of February 28, 2025, comprising $1.77 billion in cash and cash equivalents, $1.85 billion in short-term investments, and $220.5 million in restricted cash.

pairs.en: Deferred Revenue-- $671.2 million at quarter end.
pairs.zh:
递延收入——季度末为$671.2 million。

Deferred Revenue-- $671.2 million at quarter end.

pairs.en: Non-GAAP Selling & Marketing Expenses-- $214.3 million, up 77.9% year over year, comprising 35.1% of net revenues versus 28% prior; increase attributed to expanded online marketing activity and brand initiatives.
pairs.zh:
Non-GAAP销售与营销费用——2.143亿美元，同比增长77.9%，占净营收的35.1%，而去年同期为28%；增长归因于在线营销活动和品牌推广的扩大。

Non-GAAP Selling & Marketing Expenses-- $214.3 million, up 77.9% year over year, comprising 35.1% of net revenues versus 28% prior; increase attributed to expanded online marketing activity and brand initiatives.

pairs.en: Peiyou Small Class Retention Rate-- 80% for the quarter, as reported by management.
pairs.zh:
培优小班留存率——本季度为80%，据管理层报告。

Peiyou Small Class Retention Rate-- 80% for the quarter, as reported by management.

pairs.en: Learning Devices Weekly Active Rate-- ~80% weekly active users, with average daily time spent around one hour per device during the quarter.
pairs.zh:
Learning Devices周活跃率——周活跃用户约80%，本季度每台设备日均使用时长约一小时。

Learning Devices Weekly Active Rate-- ~80% weekly active users, with average daily time spent around one hour per device during the quarter.

pairs.en: Share Repurchase Program-- Board extended authorization for up to $490.7 million repurchases through April 30, 2026; $13.1 million spent repurchasing 0.5 million shares in fiscal 2025.
pairs.zh:
股票回购计划——董事会将回购授权延长至2026年4月30日，最高回购金额$490.7 million；2025财年已花费$13.1 million回购0.5 million shares。

Share Repurchase Program-- Board extended authorization for up to $490.7 million repurchases through April 30, 2026; $13.1 million spent repurchasing 0.5 million shares in fiscal 2025.

pairs.en: G&A Expenses (Non-GAAP)-- $108.5 million, up 3.5% year over year, but declined as a percentage of net revenues from 24.4% to 17.8%.
pairs.zh:
G&A费用（非GAAP）——1.085亿美元，同比增长3.5%，但占净营收的比例从24.4%下降至17.8%。

G&A Expenses (Non-GAAP)-- $108.5 million, up 3.5% year over year, but declined as a percentage of net revenues from 24.4% to 17.8%.

pairs.en: Operational Focus-- Management articulated prioritization of sustainable quality growth, channel refinement, operational efficiency, and continued AI integration across business lines.
pairs.zh:
运营重点——管理层阐述了优先事项：可持续的优质增长、渠道优化、运营效率以及各业务线持续的AI整合。  
Operational Focus-- Management articulated prioritization of sustainable quality growth, channel refinement, operational efficiency, and continued AI integration across business lines.

pairs.en: Board Appointments-- Yi Wang named Independent Director and Chairman of the Compensation Committee; Dr. Wei Wu Chen transitioned to advisor role.
pairs.zh:
董事会任命——Yi Wang被任命为独立董事和薪酬委员会主席；Dr. Wei Wu Chen转任顾问角色。

Board Appointments-- Yi Wang named Independent Director and Chairman of the Compensation Committee; Dr. Wei Wu Chen transitioned to advisor role.

pairs.en: Non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses increased to 35.1% of net revenue, up from 28%, largely due to expanded online channels and brand building, which management identified as the main reason for the year-over-year decline in adjusted operating margin.
pairs.zh:
非GAAP销售和营销费用占净收入的比例从28%上升至35.1%，主要原因是线上渠道的拓展和品牌建设，管理层认为这是调整后营业利润率同比下降的主要原因。

Non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses increased to 35.1% of net revenue, up from 28%, largely due to expanded online channels and brand building, which management identified as the main reason for the year-over-year decline in adjusted operating margin.

pairs.en: Learning Devices segment reported an adjusted operating loss in both the quarter and full fiscal year, with management emphasizing near-term prioritization of capability building over immediate profitability.
pairs.zh:
Learning Devices部门在本季度和整个财年均报告了经调整的运营亏损，管理层强调近期优先考虑能力建设而非立即盈利。

Learning Devices segment reported an adjusted operating loss in both the quarter and full fiscal year, with management emphasizing near-term prioritization of capability building over immediate profitability.

pairs.en: Sequential quarter-over-quarter revenue decline in Learning Devices attributed to seasonality following a Q3 e-commerce peak, as stated by management.
pairs.zh:
管理层表示，Learning Devices的收入环比下降，这是由于Q3电商高峰期后的季节性因素。
Sequential quarter-over-quarter revenue decline in Learning Devices attributed to seasonality following a Q3 e-commerce peak, as stated by management.

pairs.en: TAL Education Group(TAL0.51%)reported robust year-over-year revenue growth and full-year profitability on a non-GAAP basis, supported by expansion in both Learning Services and Content Solutions. Management emphasized strategic expansion, prudent operational discipline, and the integration of advanced AI features across core product lines. The company further enhanced its capital return framework by extending its share repurchase authorization and confirmed a strong cash position to support growth and shareholder returns.
pairs.zh:
好未来教育集团(TAL0.51%)报告了强劲的同比收入增长，并在非GAAP基础上实现全年盈利，这得益于学习服务和内容解决方案的扩张。管理层强调了战略扩张、审慎的运营纪律以及将先进的人工智能功能集成到核心产品线中。公司通过延长股票回购授权进一步增强了资本回报框架，并确认了强劲的现金状况以支持增长和股东回报。

TAL Education Group(TAL0.51%)reported robust year-over-year revenue growth and full-year profitability on a non-GAAP basis, supported by expansion in both Learning Services and Content Solutions. Management emphasized strategic expansion, prudent operational discipline, and the integration of advanced AI features across core product lines. The company further enhanced its capital return framework by extending its share repurchase authorization and confirmed a strong cash position to support growth and shareholder returns.

pairs.en: Management specified that operating leverage, particularly reductions in general and administrative expenses as a percentage of revenue, is an ongoing source of profitability improvement.
pairs.zh:
管理层指出，经营杠杆，尤其是将一般及行政费用占收入的比例降低，是持续提升盈利能力的一个来源。

Management specified that operating leverage, particularly reductions in general and administrative expenses as a percentage of revenue, is an ongoing source of profitability improvement.

pairs.en: Investment priorities outlined by management include continued scaling of core business lines, technology-driven product upgrades, and disciplined resource allocation.
pairs.zh:
管理层概述的投资重点包括持续扩大核心业务规模、技术驱动的产品升级以及严格的资源分配。

Investment priorities outlined by management include continued scaling of core business lines, technology-driven product upgrades, and disciplined resource allocation.

pairs.en: AI is being leveraged for content creation, personalized learning, customer service, and R&D efficiency, with DeepSeek V3 named as a foundational model for TAL’s proprietary Mass GPT initiative.
pairs.zh:
人工智能正被用于内容创作、个性化学习、客户服务和研发效率提升，其中DeepSeek V3被命名为好未来（TAL）自有Mass GPT项目的基础模型。

AI is being leveraged for content creation, personalized learning, customer service, and R&D efficiency, with DeepSeek V3 named as a foundational model for TAL’s proprietary Mass GPT initiative.

pairs.en: New board-level leadership is expected to contribute strategic and governance improvements.
pairs.zh:
新的董事会领导层预计将推动战略和治理的改进。

New board-level leadership is expected to contribute strategic and governance improvements.

pairs.en: INDUSTRY GLOSSARY
pairs.zh: 行业术语

pairs.en: Peiyou Small Class: TAL’s flagship small-group enrichment learning program for K-12 students, focused on high retention and parent satisfaction.
pairs.zh:
Peiyou Small Class：TAL的旗舰小班强化学习项目，面向K-12学生，注重高留存率和家长满意度。
Peiyou Small Class: TAL’s flagship small-group enrichment learning program for K-12 students, focused on high retention and parent satisfaction.

pairs.en: Content Solutions: Business segment including Learning Devices and digital educational products beyond traditional classroom formats.
pairs.zh:
内容解决方案：业务板块包括学习设备和超越传统课堂形式的数字教育产品。

Content Solutions: Business segment including Learning Devices and digital educational products beyond traditional classroom formats.

pairs.en: DeepSeek: AI foundational model utilized for TAL’s Mass GPT education platform to enhance subject-specific learning content and support interactive tutoring.
pairs.zh:
DeepSeek：用于TAL的Mass GPT教育平台的AI基础模型，以增强特定学科的学习内容并支持互动辅导。

DeepSeek: AI foundational model utilized for TAL’s Mass GPT education platform to enhance subject-specific learning content and support interactive tutoring.

pairs.en: Deferred Revenue: Payment collected in advance for services or products not yet delivered, commonly used as a leading indicator of future revenue recognition in education services.
pairs.zh:
递延收入：为尚未交付的服务或产品提前收取的款项，在教育服务中常用作未来收入确认的领先指标。

Deferred Revenue: Payment collected in advance for services or products not yet delivered, commonly used as a leading indicator of future revenue recognition in education services.

pairs.en: Full Conference Call Transcript
pairs.zh: 完整的电话会议记录

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thank you, Huang. I'd also like to thank all of you for participating in today's conference call. So, I'll begin with an overview of our business progress for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025. Next, Jackson will review our operational advancements and financial results. To conclude, I'll also provide a brief update on our strategic priorities and outlook moving forward. So, with that, let's get started with our core business performance this fiscal year. To begin with, our learning services delivered steady growth in fiscal year 2025, really empowering learners through both offline and online enrichment programs. An uptick in user demand and our relentless focus on high-quality learning experiences were really the key drivers of this progress.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng：谢谢黄。也感谢各位参加今天的电话会议。我将首先概述我们在2025财年第四季度及全年的业务进展。接下来，Jackson将回顾我们的运营进展和财务业绩。最后，我将简要介绍我们的战略重点和未来展望。那么，我们现在开始讨论本财年的核心业务表现。首先，我们的学习服务在2025财年实现了稳步增长，通过线下和线上的拓展项目真正赋能了学习者。用户需求的增长以及我们对高质量学习体验的不懈追求，是这一进展的关键驱动因素。

Alex Peng:Thank you, Huang. I'd also like to thank all of you for participating in today's conference call. So, I'll begin with an overview of our business progress for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025. Next, Jackson will review our operational advancements and financial results. To conclude, I'll also provide a brief update on our strategic priorities and outlook moving forward. So, with that, let's get started with our core business performance this fiscal year. To begin with, our learning services delivered steady growth in fiscal year 2025, really empowering learners through both offline and online enrichment programs. An uptick in user demand and our relentless focus on high-quality learning experiences were really the key drivers of this progress.

pairs.en: During the past quarter, we strategically added new enrichment learning centers in existing cities, providing local communities with more accessible and convenient learning opportunities. Our online enrichment learning business also remained healthy, consistently providing engaging learning experiences through technology-driven learning products. Over the past year, we conducted in-depth analysis of user preferences and tailored the development of new products to better meet their needs. We also continue to refine existing offerings, based on user feedback, and we enhance teaching effectiveness by integrating smart interactive features to boost user engagement. Then, for Learning Devices, we expanded our product offerings to reach a broader user base, making it easier for users to find the right learning solution for their needs.
pairs.zh:
过去一个季度，我们在现有城市战略性增设了新的Enrichment Learning Centers，为当地社区提供更便捷的学习机会。我们的线上Enrichment Learning业务也保持健康，持续通过技术驱动的学习产品提供引人入胜的学习体验。过去一年中，我们对用户偏好进行了深入分析，并针对性地开发新产品以更好地满足其需求。我们还根据用户反馈不断优化现有产品，通过集成智能互动功能来提升教学效果，增强用户参与度。至于Learning Devices，我们扩展了产品线以覆盖更广泛的用户群体，让用户更容易找到适合自身需求的学习解决方案。

原文：
During the past quarter, we strategically added new enrichment learning centers in existing cities, providing local communities with more accessible and convenient learning opportunities. Our online enrichment learning business also remained healthy, consistently providing engaging learning experiences through technology-driven learning products. Over the past year, we conducted in-depth analysis of user preferences and tailored the development of new products to better meet their needs. We also continue to refine existing offerings, based on user feedback, and we enhance teaching effectiveness by integrating smart interactive features to boost user engagement. Then, for Learning Devices, we expanded our product offerings to reach a broader user base, making it easier for users to find the right learning solution for their needs.

pairs.en: We also integrated more smart features and learning resources to better support users on their self-learning journeys. Through monthly feature updates and content refresh, we provide the users with an increasingly intelligent and practical study companion, making at-home self-learning more engaging and efficient. So, with this operational momentum as a backlog, let's turn to our financial highlights for the quarter and the full year. In the fourth quarter, we recorded net revenues of $610.2 million or RMB 4.44 billion, reflecting year-over-year growth of 42.1% and 44.3% respectively. On a non-GAAP basis, loss from operations was $1.7 million while net income attributable to TAL reached $7 million.
pairs.zh:
我们还集成了更多智能功能和学习资源，以更好地支持用户的自学之旅。通过每月功能更新和内容刷新，我们为用户提供日益智能且实用的学习伴侣，让居家自学变得更有趣、更高效。因此，在运营势能作为基础的前提下，让我们来看本季度和全年的财务亮点。第四季度，我们录得净收入6.102亿美元，即44.4亿元人民币，同比分别增长42.1%和44.3%。按非美国通用会计准则计算，运营亏损为170万美元，而好未来（TAL）归属净利润达到700万美元。

We also integrated more smart features and learning resources to better support users on their self-learning journeys. Through monthly feature updates and content refresh, we provide the users with an increasingly intelligent and practical study companion, making at-home self-learning more engaging and efficient. So, with this operational momentum as a backlog, let's turn to our financial highlights for the quarter and the full year. In the fourth quarter, we recorded net revenues of $610.2 million or RMB 4.44 billion, reflecting year-over-year growth of 42.1% and 44.3% respectively. On a non-GAAP basis, loss from operations was $1.7 million while net income attributable to TAL reached $7 million.

pairs.en: For the full fiscal year, net revenues totaled $2.3 billion or RMB 16.2 billion RMB, up 51% and 52.2% year-over-year respectively. Non-GAAP income from operations amounted to $61.8 million with non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL at a $149.5 million. Before Jackson takes us through the detailed operational and financial review, I'd like to share a brief update from the Board. We are delighted to welcome Mr. Yi Wang as TAL's new Independent Director and Chairman of the Compensation Committee. Mr. Wang brings extensive experience across both the business and education sectors, and we are confident that his insights will further strengthen TAL's strategic direction, governance, and operational excellence. We also want to express our deep appreciation to Dr.
pairs.zh:
整个财年，净收入总额达23亿美元（即162亿元人民币），同比分别增长51%和52.2%。非通用会计准则运营收入为6180万美元，归属于好未来的非通用会计准则净利润为1.495亿美元。在Jackson带大家进行详细的运营和财务回顾之前，我想先分享来自董事会的简要更新。我们很高兴欢迎王毅先生出任好未来新任独立董事及薪酬委员会主席。王先生在企业与教育领域拥有丰富经验，我们相信他的见解将进一步增强好未来的战略方向、治理水平与运营卓越性。同时，我们向Dr.

原文：
For the full fiscal year, net revenues totaled $2.3 billion or RMB 16.2 billion RMB, up 51% and 52.2% year-over-year respectively. Non-GAAP income from operations amounted to $61.8 million with non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL at a $149.5 million. We are delighted to welcome Mr. Yi Wang as TAL's new Independent Director and Chairman of the Compensation Committee. Mr. Wang brings extensive experience across both the business and education sectors, and we are confident that his insights will further strengthen TAL's strategic direction, governance, and operational excellence. We also want to express our deep appreciation to Dr.

pairs.en: Wei Wu Chen for his outstanding service and invaluable contributions over the past decade. We look forward to continue our collaboration with Dr. Chen in his new advisor role. So, with that high level overview complete, I'll now pass the call to Jackson to delve deeper into our operational execution and detailed financial performance. Jackson?
pairs.zh:
感谢Wei Wu Chen过去十年来的杰出服务和宝贵贡献。我们期待与陈博士在新的顾问角色中继续合作。那么，在高层概述之后，我现在将电话转给Jackson，请他深入探讨我们的运营执行和详细的财务业绩。Jackson？

Wei Wu Chen for his outstanding service and invaluable contributions over the past decade. We look forward to continue our collaboration with Dr. Chen in his new advisor role. So, with that high level overview complete, I'll now pass the call to Jackson to delve deeper into our operational execution and detailed financial performance. Jackson?

pairs.en: Jackson Ding:Thank you, Alex. Before diving into the details, I'd like to note that all quarterly financial figures discussed today are unaudited. I'll start with our Learning Services and Others business, which includes a broad range of learning programs for our customers. Learning Services sustained its revenue growth momentum in the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025, fueled by advancements across multiple product lines. Over the past few quarters, revenue from Peiyou Small Class Enrichment programs has achieved year-over-year growth. We have consistently provided high-quality services, earning positive feedback from both the learners and their parents. While we have expanded our learning center footprint, we've maintained a disciplined approach.
pairs.zh:
Jackson Ding：谢谢，Alex。在深入讨论细节之前，我想指出，今天讨论的所有季度财务数据均为未经审计。我将首先介绍我们的Learning Services and Others业务，该业务涵盖面向客户的一系列广泛学习项目。在2025财年第四季度，Learning Services凭借多个产品线的进展，保持了收入增长势头。过去几个季度，培优小班拓展课程的收入实现了同比增长。我们始终坚持提供高质量服务，赢得了学习者和家长的积极反馈。在扩大学习中心布局的同时，我们保持了严谨的态度。

原文：
Jackson Ding:Thank you, Alex. Before diving into the details, I'd like to note that all quarterly financial figures discussed today are unaudited. I'll start with our Learning Services and Others business, which includes a broad range of learning programs for our customers. Learning Services sustained its revenue growth momentum in the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025, fueled by advancements across multiple product lines. Over the past few quarters, revenue from Peiyou Small Class Enrichment programs has achieved year-over-year growth. We have consistently provided high-quality services, earning positive feedback from both the learners and their parents. While we have expanded our learning center footprint, we've maintained a disciplined approach.

pairs.en: We're carefully evaluating market demand, user feedback, and operational efficiency to balance growth with quality. This approach has been further validated by key operational metrics and has directly contributed to year-over-year enrollment growth. Notably, the retention rate for Peiyou Small Class reached 80% this fiscal quarter. In our online enrichment learning business, ongoing innovation has helped us to navigate the ever-evolving market landscape and our users' dynamic needs. Guided by user feedback and market insights, we're continually investing in strengthening our online product capabilities and refining our operational and marketing strategies. Through new products and interactive formats, we deliver tangible value to learners, enhancing both learning outcomes and user experiences. Recent initiatives include interactive learning modules and AI-powered assistants.
pairs.zh:
我们正在仔细评估市场需求、用户反馈和运营效率，以平衡增长与质量。这一方法已得到关键运营指标的进一步验证，并直接促进了入学人数的同比增长。值得注意的是，本财季Peiyou Small Class的留存率达到了80%。在我们的在线拓展学习业务中，持续创新帮助我们应对不断变化的市场格局和用户动态需求。在用户反馈和市场洞察的指导下，我们持续投资加强在线产品能力，并优化运营和市场策略。通过新产品和互动形式，我们为学习者提供实实在在的价值，提升学习效果和用户体验。近期举措包括互动学习模块和AI-powered assistants。

原文：
We're carefully evaluating market demand, user feedback, and operational efficiency to balance growth with quality. This approach has been further validated by key operational metrics and has directly contributed to year-over-year enrollment growth. Notably, the retention rate for Peiyou Small Class reached 80% this fiscal quarter. In our online enrichment learning business, ongoing innovation has helped us to navigate the ever-evolving market landscape and our users' dynamic needs. Guided by user feedback and market insights, we're continually investing in strengthening our online product capabilities and refining our operational and marketing strategies. Through new products and interactive formats, we deliver tangible value to learners, enhancing both learning outcomes and user experiences. Recent initiatives include interactive learning modules and AI-powered assistants.

pairs.en: Additionally, by building diverse customer touchpoints across multiple channels, we're expanding our market reach among current and potential users and gaining deeper insights into their needs. This has enabled us to scale our operations while laying the foundation for sustained long-term competitiveness. Next, let's turn to our Content Solutions business. Our Learning Devices business grew year-over-year in the fourth fiscal quarter, fueled by our enhanced product development and go-to-market capabilities. We have expanded our Learning Devices product portfolio to appeal to a wider audience in the past year. We also further upgraded our hardware and software, enriching our content library, refining the reading experience, and integrating practical AI features to create more immersive self-directed learning.
pairs.zh:
此外，通过在多渠道构建多样化的客户接触点，我们正在扩大对现有及潜在用户的市场覆盖，并更深入地洞察他们的需求。这使我们能够扩大运营规模，同时为持续长期竞争力奠定基础。接下来，我们来关注内容解决方案业务。我们的Learning Devices业务在第四财季实现同比增长，这得益于我们增强的产品开发和市场推广能力。过去一年，我们扩大了Learning Devices产品组合，以吸引更广泛的受众。我们还进一步升级了硬件和软件，丰富了内容库，优化了阅读体验，并集成了实用的AI功能，以打造更具沉浸感的自主学习体验。

Additionally, by building diverse customer touchpoints across multiple channels, we're expanding our market reach among current and potential users and gaining deeper insights into their needs. This has enabled us to scale our operations while laying the foundation for sustained long-term competitiveness. Next, let's turn to our Content Solutions business. Our Learning Devices business grew year-over-year in the fourth fiscal quarter, fueled by our enhanced product development and go-to-market capabilities. We have expanded our Learning Devices product portfolio to appeal to a wider audience in the past year. We also further upgraded our hardware and software, enriching our content library, refining the reading experience, and integrating practical AI features to create more immersive self-directed learning.

pairs.en: This February, we further enriched our content across our entire range of Learning Devices by providing fresh and classic materials with progressively challenging exercises. We keep students engaged while developing their ability to question, analyze, and problem solve. Our unique ladder approach, which guides children step-by-step with tailored hints, helps them to build confidence as they master new skills. To strengthen foundational literacy, we launched a seamless graded reading system covering early education through high school with age-appropriate tools like phonetic aids for young learners and interdisciplinary content for older students. Through partnerships with over 20 publishers, we have expanded our library to include thousands of titles.
pairs.zh:
今年二月，我们通过提供新鲜与经典的学习材料，并配以循序渐进的练习，进一步丰富了全系列Learning Devices的内容。在培养学生提问、分析和解决问题能力的同时，我们持续激发他们的学习兴趣。我们独特的ladder approach以量身定制的提示引导孩子逐步学习，帮助他们在掌握新技能的过程中建立自信。为夯实基础读写能力，我们推出了覆盖从早教到高中的无缝分级阅读系统，针对低龄学习者提供phonetic aids等适龄工具，为高年级学生提供跨学科内容。通过与20多家出版商合作，我们的图书馆已扩展至数千种书目。

This February, we further enriched our content across our entire range of Learning Devices by providing fresh and classic materials with progressively challenging exercises. We keep students engaged while developing their ability to question, analyze, and problem solve. Our unique ladder approach, which guides children step-by-step with tailored hints, helps them to build confidence as they master new skills. To strengthen foundational literacy, we launched a seamless graded reading system covering early education through high school with age-appropriate tools like phonetic aids for young learners and interdisciplinary content for older students. Through partnerships with over 20 publishers, we have expanded our library to include thousands of titles.

pairs.en: Thanks to our enhanced product capabilities, our Learning Devices have sustained solid user engagement while reaching a broader audience. Notably, as our active user base continues to grow, the weekly active rate has remained stable at around 80%, with an average daily time spent of approximately an hour per device throughout the quarter. Next, please let me now review our financial performance for the quarter. The company reported net revenues of $610.2 million or RMB 4.44 billion, representing a year-over-year growth of 42.1% in U.S. dollar terms and 44.3% in RMB terms. These increases were attributable to the growth in both our Learning Services business and our Content Solutions business. Now looking at costs.
pairs.zh:
得益于我们增强的产品能力，我们的Learning Devices在触达更广泛用户的同时，保持了稳固的用户参与度。值得注意的是，随着活跃用户基础的持续扩大，每周活跃率稳定在约80%，本季度每台设备的日均使用时长约为1小时。接下来，请允许我回顾本季度的财务表现。公司报告净收入为6.102亿美元或44.4亿元人民币，按美元计算同比增长42.1%，按人民币计算同比增长44.3%。这些增长归因于我们的Learning Services业务和Content Solutions业务的双向增长。接下来看成本部分。

原文：
Thanks to our enhanced product capabilities, our Learning Devices have sustained solid user engagement while reaching a broader audience. Notably, as our active user base continues to grow, the weekly active rate has remained stable at around 80%, with an average daily time spent of approximately an hour per device throughout the quarter. Next, please let me now review our financial performance for the quarter. The company reported net revenues of $610.2 million or RMB 4.44 billion, representing a year-over-year growth of 42.1% in U.S. dollar terms and 44.3% in RMB terms. These increases were attributable to the growth in both our Learning Services business and our Content Solutions business. Now looking at costs.

pairs.en: Cost of revenues rose 44.7% year-over-year to $292.6 million from $202.2 million. When excluding share-based compensation expenses, non-GAAP cost of revenues moved 46.1% higher to $291.7 million compared to $199.6 million in the same quarter last year. Gross profit stood at $317.6 million, which was $39.7 million above the prior year period. Gross margin was at 52% compared to 52.9% from the same period last year. Turning to operating expenses. Selling and marketing expenses for the quarter were $218 million up 73.1% from the prior year. The non-GAAP equivalent of these expenses increased 77.9% to $214.3 million.
pairs.zh:
收入成本同比增长44.7%，从2.022亿美元增至2.926亿美元。剔除基于股份的薪酬支出后，非GAAP收入成本同比增长46.1%，达到2.917亿美元，而去年同期为1.996亿美元。毛利润为3.176亿美元，比去年同期高出3970万美元。毛利率为52%，去年同期为52.9%。接下来看运营支出。本季度的销售和营销支出为2.18亿美元，同比增长73.1%。这些支出的非GAAP等价数据增长77.9%，达到2.143亿美元。

pairs.en: As a percentage of net revenues, non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses accounted for 35.1% versus 28% in the prior year period, with the change mainly resulting from increased selling and marketing activities through some online channels. General and administrative expenses increased 0.8% to $118.2 million compared to the same period last year. The non-GAAP measure showed a 3.5% rise to $108.5 million. However, as a percentage of net revenues, non-GAAP general and administrative expenses decreased from 24.4% to 17.8%. Total share-based compensation expenses declined 30.1% to $14.3 million from $20.5 million in the comparable period. Loss from operations was $16.0 million for the quarter. This compares to a loss from operations of $11.1 million in the same period last year.

pairs.en: On a non-GAAP basis, the loss from operations was $1.7 million compared to non-GAAP income from operations of $9.4 million in the same period of last year. Net loss attributable to TAL was $7.3 million for the quarter, while in the same period last year, there was net income attributable to TAL of $27.5 million. Non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL was $7.0 million versus $48.0 million in the same period last year. Regarding our cash position, as of February 28, 2025, we held $1.77 million, excuse me, we held $1.77 billion in cash and cash equivalents along with US$1.85 billion in short-term investments and US$220.5 million in restricted cash. Our deferred revenue balance was $671.2 million at quarter end.
pairs.zh:
按非美国通用会计准则（non-GAAP）计算，经营亏损为170万美元，而去年同期经营收入为940万美元。本季度归属于好未来（TAL）的净亏损为730万美元，而去年同期归属于好未来的净利润为2750万美元。按非美国通用会计准则计算，归属于好未来的净利润为700万美元，而去年同期为4800万美元。关于现金状况，截至2025年2月28日，我们持有177万美元，抱歉，我们持有17.7亿美元的现金及现金等价物，以及18.5亿美元的短期投资和2.205亿美元的受限现金。季度末递延收入余额为6.712亿美元。

Net loss attributable to TAL was $7.3 million for the quarter, while in the same period last year, there was net income attributable to TAL of $27.5 million. pairs.en: In terms of cash flow, net cash used in operating activities was $226.3 million during the quarter. For the full fiscal year 2025, net revenues were $2.3 billion or $16.2 billion, reflecting year-over-year increase of 51.0% in U.S. dollar terms and 52.2% in RMB terms. Gross profit was $1.2 billion, 48.9% higher than the previous year. Loss from operations was $3.2 million in the fiscal year 2025 compared to loss from operations of $69.2 million in fiscal 2024. On a non-GAAP basis, income from operations was $61.8 million versus $19.7 million in the prior fiscal year.
pairs.zh:

In terms of cash flow, net cash used in operating activities was $226.3 million during the quarter. For the full fiscal year 2025, net revenues were $2.3 billion or $16.2 billion, reflecting year-over-year increase of 51.0% in U.S. dollar terms and 52.2% in RMB terms. Gross profit was $1.2 billion, 48.9% higher than the previous year. Loss from operations was $3.2 million in the fiscal year 2025 compared to loss from operations of $69.2 million in fiscal 2024. On a non-GAAP basis, income from operations was $61.8 million versus $19.7 million in the prior fiscal year.

pairs.en: On the bottom line, net income attributable to TAL came to $84.6 million compared to a net loss attributable to TAL of $3.6 million in fiscal 2024. Non-GAAP net income attributable to TAL was $149.5 million, while previous fiscal year showed $85.3 million. Finally, I'd like to briefly address our share repurchase program. In April 2025, the company's Board of Directors approved a 12-month extension of its share repurchase program, originally launched in April 2021. Under the extended program, the company may spend up to approximately $490.7 million to repurchase its common shares through April 30, 2026. In fiscal 2025, the company had repurchased 0.5 million common shares for a total consideration of approximately $13.1 million under the program.
pairs.zh:
在利润方面，TAL归属股东净利润为8460万美元，而2024财年归属股东净亏损为360万美元。非美国通用会计准则下，TAL归属净利润为1.495亿美元，上一财年为8530万美元。最后，我想简要谈谈我们的股票回购计划。2025年4月，公司董事会批准将最初于2021年4月启动的股票回购计划延长12个月。根据延长后的计划，公司可在2026年4月30日前回购其普通股，总金额最高约为4.907亿美元。2025财年，公司已根据该计划回购了50万股普通股，总对价约为1310万美元。

Under the extended program, the company may spend up to approximately $490.7 million to repurchase its common shares through April 30, 2026. pairs.en: That concludes my review of our business performance and financial updates. Alex, I'll now hand the call back to you for our outlook.
pairs.zh:
以上是我对我们业务表现和财务更新的总结。Alex，现在我将把电话交回给你，由你来介绍我们的展望。

That concludes my review of our business performance and financial updates. Alex, I'll now hand the call back to you for our outlook.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thanks, Jackson. Overall, we believe fiscal year 2025 laid a solid foundation for our future development. Now I'd like to share insights into the company's strategy and outlook for fiscal year 2026. So, first, we remain committed to sustainable growth in our core business lines. We will continue to uphold the high-quality standards for both our offline and online enrichment learning products and services to deliver quality programs to an even broader user base. We anticipate that our learning services will continue to be our largest revenue stream in the new fiscal year. Beyond learning services, we're also focused on expanding our learning Content Solutions.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng: 谢谢Jackson。总体而言，我们认为2025财年为未来发展奠定了坚实基础。现在我想分享对公司战略及2026财年展望的一些见解。首先，我们仍致力于核心业务线的可持续增长。我们将继续坚持线上线下富集学习产品与服务的高质量标准，为更广泛的用户群体提供优质课程。我们预计学习服务在新财年将继续成为最大的收入来源。除学习服务外，我们也在积极推进学习内容解决方案的拓展。

原文：
Alex Peng:Thanks, Jackson. Overall, we believe fiscal year 2025 laid a solid foundation for our future development. Now I'd like to share insights into the company's strategy and outlook for fiscal year 2026. So, first, we remain committed to sustainable growth in our core business lines. We will continue to uphold the high-quality standards for both our offline and online enrichment learning products and services to deliver quality programs to an even broader user base. We anticipate that our learning services will continue to be our largest revenue stream in the new fiscal year. Beyond learning services, we're also focused on expanding our learning Content Solutions.

pairs.en: We will continue scaling this business, thoughtfully refining our content and device features, and leveraging technological advancements, particularly AI-driven features, to enhance learning outcomes. As our business continues to evolve and grow, we're actively exploring new fields and emerging sectors to extend our core business lines' reach. Along the way, we're also steadily strengthening our channel capabilities, building brand recognition, and deepening our engagement with the new generation of parents and learners. Through these efforts, we're consistently cleaning valuable insights from outstanding companies across various industries and will continue to refine our growth strategies accordingly in the upcoming fiscal year. Secondly, we're committed to ongoing innovation at the intersection of learning and technology.
pairs.zh:
我们将继续扩展这一业务，精心优化内容和设备功能，并利用技术进步，特别是AI驱动的功能，来提升学习效果。随着业务持续演进和增长，我们正在积极探索新领域和新兴行业，以拓展核心业务线的覆盖范围。在此过程中，我们也在稳步加强渠道能力、建立品牌认知，并深化与新一代家长和学习者的互动。通过这些努力，我们不断从各行业的杰出公司中汲取宝贵见解，并将在下一财年据此持续优化增长策略。其次，我们致力于在学习与技术的交汇点上持续创新。

原文：
We will continue scaling this business, thoughtfully refining our content and device features, and leveraging technological advancements, particularly AI-driven features, to enhance learning outcomes. As our business continues to evolve and grow, we're actively exploring new fields and emerging sectors to extend our core business lines' reach. Along the way, we're also steadily strengthening our channel capabilities, building brand recognition, and deepening our engagement with the new generation of parents and learners. Through these efforts, we're consistently cleaning valuable insights from outstanding companies across various industries and will continue to refine our growth strategies accordingly in the upcoming fiscal year. Secondly, we're committed to ongoing innovation at the intersection of learning and technology.

pairs.en: By integrating cutting-edge AI with pedagogical expertise, we seek to meaningfully improve both learning and teaching experiences. Looking ahead, we'll continue to enhance our products and services to meet the evolving demands of digital learning, redefining intelligent learning solutions for the AI era. Throughout history, every major technological breakthrough from television to computers and the Internet has found its way into education. Today, we are discovering and shaping how AI can transform learning and integrating these advancements into our products and services. We also remain open to collaboration and knowledge sharing, ensuring that our insights into smart learning contribute meaningful value to the education community. Finally, we will focus on refining operation details to boost overall efficiency and profitability.
pairs.zh:
通过将尖端人工智能与教学专业知识相结合，我们致力于有意义地改善学习和教学体验。展望未来，我们将持续优化产品与服务，以满足数字化学习不断变化的需求，重新定义人工智能时代的智能学习解决方案。纵观历史，从电视到电脑再到互联网，每一次重大技术突破最终都进入了教育领域。如今，我们正在探索并塑造人工智能如何改变学习方式，并将这些进步融入我们的产品和服务中。我们同样保持开放态度，积极合作与知识共享，确保我们在智慧学习领域的洞察为教育社群贡献切实价值。最后，我们将聚焦于优化运营细节，以提升整体效率和盈利能力。

By integrating cutting-edge AI with pedagogical expertise, we seek to meaningfully improve both learning and teaching experiences. Looking ahead, we'll continue to enhance our products and services to meet the evolving demands of digital learning, redefining intelligent learning solutions for the AI era. Throughout history, every major technological breakthrough from television to computers and the Internet has found its way into education. Today, we are discovering and shaping how AI can transform learning and integrating these advancements into our products and services. We also remain open to collaboration and knowledge sharing, ensuring that our insights into smart learning contribute meaningful value to the education community. Finally, we will focus on refining operation details to boost overall efficiency and profitability.

pairs.en: While we expect to benefit from economies of scale, as our revenue grows, efficient management will be increasingly critical, as our operations expand and become more complex. We'll closely monitor efficiency metrics across all business lines and make timely adjustments to optimize every aspect of our operations, including content creation, product R&D, sales, marketing, and beyond. So that concludes my prepared remarks. Operator, I think we are ready to open the call for questions.
pairs.zh:
虽然我们期望随着收入增长而获得规模经济效应，但随着业务扩张和复杂化，高效管理将愈发关键。我们将密切监测所有业务线的效率指标，并及时调整以优化运营的各个环节，包括内容创作、产品研发、销售、营销等。以上是我的开场陈述。会议助理，我想我们可以开始问答环节了。

原文：
While we expect to benefit from economies of scale, as our revenue grows, efficient management will be increasingly critical, as our operations expand and become more complex. We'll closely monitor efficiency metrics across all business lines and make timely adjustments to optimize every aspect of our operations, including content creation, product R&D, sales, marketing, and beyond. So that concludes my prepared remarks. Operator, I think we are ready to open the call for questions.

pairs.en: Operator:Thank you.[Operator Instructions]We will now take our first question from the line of Eddie Wang from Morgan Stanley. Please ask your question, Eddie.
pairs.zh:
操作员：谢谢。[操作员指令]我们现在接受第一位提问者，来自Morgan Stanley的Eddie Wang。请提问，Eddie。

Operator:Thank you.[Operator Instructions]We will now take our first question from the line of Eddie Wang from Morgan Stanley. Please ask your question, Eddie.

pairs.en: Eddie Wang:Thank you, Alex, Jackson, Fang for taking my question. My question is regarding the Peiyou enrichment learning business. Could management provide an update on the progress of the fourth quarter Peiyou enrichment learning business? And how should we view the growth strategy and expansion pace for Peiyou in the next fiscal year? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
Eddie Wang: 谢谢Alex, Jackson, Fang回答我的问题。我的问题涉及培优拓展学习业务。管理层能否更新第四季度培优拓展学习业务的进展？我们应该如何看待培优在下一财年的增长策略和扩张速度？谢谢。

Eddie Wang:Thank you, Alex, Jackson, Fang for taking my question. My question is regarding the Peiyou enrichment learning business. Could management provide an update on the progress of the fourth quarter Peiyou enrichment learning business? And how should we view the growth strategy and expansion pace for Peiyou in the next fiscal year? Thank you.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thanks, Eddie. This is Alex. Let me take that one. Really, as we've seen in recent quarters, Peiyou continues to deliver a steady year-over-year growth. I think we've already covered the key highlights in our prepared remarks. So, let me instead focus more on our path forward. Okay. So, looking ahead to the next fiscal year, really as long as our key growth drivers, which is market demand, product capability, our ability to recruit and train our instructors, as long as these key growth drivers hold up, we really expect to maintain this positive momentum for Peiyou, but I also want to just add, technology will play an increasingly important role in our strategy, right?
pairs.zh:
谢谢，Eddie。我是Alex。我来回答这个问题。确实，正如我们在最近几个季度所见，Peiyou持续实现稳定的同比增长。我想我们在准备好的发言中已经涵盖了关键亮点。因此，让我更多地聚焦于我们未来的发展路径。展望下一个财年，只要我们的关键增长驱动因素——即市场需求、产品能力、我们招聘和培训讲师的能力——这些关键驱动因素保持强劲，我们确实预计将维持Peiyou的积极势头。但我也想补充一点，技术将在我们的战略中扮演越来越重要的角色。

Alex Peng:Thanks, Eddie. This is Alex. Let me take that one. Really, as we've seen in recent quarters, Peiyou continues to deliver a steady year-over-year growth. I think we've already covered the key highlights in our prepared remarks. So, let me instead focus more on our path forward. Okay. So, looking ahead to the next fiscal year, really as long as our key growth drivers, which is market demand, product capability, our ability to recruit and train our instructors, as long as these key growth drivers hold up, we really expect to maintain this positive momentum for Peiyou, but I also want to just add, technology will play an increasingly important role in our strategy, right?

pairs.en: So, you may have noticed, we are expanding the rollout of our dual small and large screen solutions. It really brings smart classroom experiences to more students. I think, literally, it's reimagining the classroom learning experience. And at the same time, we're continuing to innovate our products and refine our product market fit to create solutions that are both students, loved by students and trusted by parents.
pairs.zh:
你可能已经注意到，我们正在扩大大小双屏解决方案的推广范围。这确实为更多学生带来了智能教室体验。我认为，这实际上是在重新构想课堂学习体验。与此同时，我们也在持续创新产品，优化产品市场契合度，以打造既受学生喜爱又让家长信任的解决方案。

So, you may have noticed, we are expanding the rollout of our dual small and large screen solutions. It really brings smart classroom experiences to more students. I think, literally, it's reimagining the classroom learning experience. And at the same time, we're continuing to innovate our products and refine our product market fit to create solutions that are both students, loved by students and trusted by parents.

pairs.en: We're firm really in our belief that sustainable growth in this market comes from developing and continuously developing these high-quality products with strong performance metrics that really truly meet user needs and it's not just user needs in a broad sense, but localized user needs and this will remain central to our product development philosophy and strategy. I know many of you are interested in expansion. Regarding expansion, we're maintaining the same prudent approach that has served us well this past year. Each decision to open a new learning center really carefully balances multiple factors. The local market demand, when I say local, it's truly local to a city, to a district, to a community.
pairs.zh:
我们坚定地相信，这个市场的可持续增长来自于开发并持续开发这些高质量产品，这些产品具备优异的性能指标，真正满足用户需求——不仅仅是广义上的用户需求，而是本地化的用户需求。这将继续成为我们产品开发理念和战略的核心。我知道你们很多人在关注扩张问题。关于扩张，我们保持着过去一年中行之有效的审慎策略。每个新学习中心的开设决策，都需要仔细平衡多重因素：当地市场需求——我所说的"当地"，是具体到一个城市、一个街区、一个社区。

原文：
We're firm really in our belief that sustainable growth in this market comes from developing and continuously developing these high-quality products with strong performance metrics that really truly meet user needs and it's not just user needs in a broad sense, but localized user needs and this will remain central to our product development philosophy and strategy. I know many of you are interested in expansion. Regarding expansion, we're maintaining the same prudent approach that has served us well this past year. Each decision to open a new learning center really carefully balances multiple factors. The local market demand, when I say local, it's truly local to a city, to a district, to a community.

pairs.en: The customer adoption, operational capacity, and efficiency target. So, I think this disciplined methodology will continue to guide our business to fiscal year '26. Really, if I take a step back, I would say, we remain optimistic about industry's growth potential. In this new sector, I think I've talked about before, we feel -- we truly feel the enrichment learning is hitting, the need with this new generation of parents and learners, and we're optimistic about our ability to deliver high-quality products to meet that future needs. Really as we are operating from a significantly higher baseline than a few years ago, we expect Peiyou enrichment's year-on-year growth rate to probably gradually taper off moving forward.
pairs.zh:
客户采纳、运营能力及效率目标。因此，我认为这种严谨的方法论将继续指引我们的业务迈向2026财年。实际上，退一步来看，我想说，我们仍然对行业的增长潜力持乐观态度。在这个新领域中，我记得之前提到过，我们真切感受到培优学习正在击中新一代家长和学习者的需求，并且我们对自身交付高质量产品以满足未来需求的能力充满信心。由于我们目前的运营基数比几年前高出不少，预计Peiyou enrichment的同比增长率可能会逐步放缓。

pairs.en: But our focus really remains what I just said before, the sustainable healthy growth rather than pursuing hyper growth for growth's sake. So, Eddie, I hope that answered your question.
pairs.zh:
但我们的重点实际上仍然是我之前所说的，可持续的健康增长，而不是为了增长而追求超高速增长。所以，Eddie，我希望这回答了你的问题。

But our focus really remains what I just said before, the sustainable healthy growth rather than pursuing hyper growth for growth's sake. So, Eddie, I hope that answered your question.

pairs.en: Operator:Thank you. Our next question comes from the line of Timothy Zhao from Goldman Sachs. Please ask your question, Timothy.
pairs.zh:
操作员：谢谢。我们的下一个问题来自高盛的Timothy Zhao。请提问，Timothy。

Operator:Thank you. Our next question comes from the line of Timothy Zhao from Goldman Sachs. Please ask your question, Timothy.

pairs.en: Timothy Zhao:Great. Thank you, management, for taking my question. My question is regarding the Learning Devices or the Learning Content Solutions segment. Just wondering if management can give us some color on the profitability profile of this segment in the fourth quarter and also in the fiscal year, last year. And when you look into fiscal year 2026, I'm just wondering if there's any updates on your strategy on this specific segment, and what are the new plans or measures that you are going to take to further improve the profitability of the Learning Content Solutions segment? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
Timothy Zhao：好的。感谢管理层回答我的问题。我的问题涉及学习设备或学习内容解决方案部门。我想了解一下，该部门去年第四季度以及整个财年的盈利状况如何？另外，展望2026财年，管理层在该部门是否有任何战略更新？以及你们计划采取哪些新举措或措施来进一步提升学习内容解决方案部门的盈利能力？谢谢。

原文：
Timothy Zhao:Great. Thank you, management, for taking my question. My question is regarding the Learning Devices or the Learning Content Solutions segment. Just wondering if management can give us some color on the profitability profile of this segment in the fourth quarter and also in the fiscal year, last year. And when you look into fiscal year 2026, I'm just wondering if there's any updates on your strategy on this specific segment, and what are the new plans or measures that you are going to take to further improve the profitability of the Learning Content Solutions segment? Thank you.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thanks, Timothy. This is Alex. Let me take this one as well. Look, our learning device business reported an adjusted operating loss in our P&L in the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal full year of 2025. It's a new product group that launched about two years ago, and we believe this business still has room to really expand access to high-quality learning experience, at-home self-learning experience we just talked about, really, and that among a much wider range of customers. At this stage, our priority really remains building long-term competitiveness and capabilities. So, if I move to our strategy for fiscal 2026, our efforts were focused on the following few areas. So, I would say, first, enhancing the device functionality.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng：谢谢Timothy。我是Alex，这个问题也由我来回答。大家可以看到，在学习设备业务上，我们2025财年第四季度及全年的损益表中报告了调整后运营亏损。这是一个大约两年前推出的新产品组，我们认为该业务仍有很大空间，能够将我们刚才提到的高质量学习体验、在家自学体验真正扩展到更广泛的客户群体。现阶段，我们的首要任务仍然是建立长期竞争力和能力。因此，如果谈到2026财年的战略，我们的努力主要集中在以下几个方面。首先，我认为是提升设备功能。

Alex Peng:Thanks, Timothy. This is Alex. Let me take this one as well. Look, our learning device business reported an adjusted operating loss in our P&L in the fiscal fourth quarter and fiscal full year of 2025. It's a new product group that launched about two years ago, and we believe this business still has room to really expand access to high-quality learning experience, at-home self-learning experience we just talked about, really, and that among a much wider range of customers. pairs.en: We'll roll out artificial intelligence empower functionality upgrades, continuously. We continuously expand our content library. We believe these are the core values we deliver to our learners and I think that's been our track record in the past two years of regular and continuous updates, to functionalities and to the content library. Secondly, I think we're going to expand our portfolio. Our effort in expanding the portfolio really would improve product market fit and expand access. As I said, we're very convinced that, there is ample room to expand access, and thereby expand the access to high-quality learning experiences, high-quality content. So, our expanding portfolio will aim to do that. Number three is go-to-market.
pairs.zh:
我们将持续推出人工智能赋能功能升级。我们不断扩展内容库。我们相信这些是我们为学习者提供的核心价值，而且我认为，这正是我们过去两年在功能和内容库方面进行定期、持续更新的记录。其次，我认为我们将扩大产品组合。扩大产品组合的努力将真正改善产品市场契合度并扩大可及性。正如我所说，我们深信，在扩大可及性、进而扩大优质学习体验和优质内容的可及性方面，还有充足的空间。因此，我们扩展产品组合的目标正是如此。第三是市场推广。

原文：
We'll roll out artificial intelligence empower functionality upgrades, continuously. We continuously expand our content library. We believe these are the core values we deliver to our learners and I think that's been our track record in the past two years of regular and continuous updates, to functionalities and to the content library. Secondly, I think we're going to expand our portfolio. Our effort in expanding the portfolio really would improve product market fit and expand access. As I said, we're very convinced that, there is ample room to expand access, and thereby expand the access to high-quality learning experiences, high-quality content. So, our expanding portfolio will aim to do that. Number three is go-to-market.

pairs.en: I think we've been enhancing our distribution, our marketing to reach more users while deepening engagement with existing customers. Both are very crucial and you probably have seen and we've discussed this in on previous calls. When we look at the go-to-market, we look across different channel formats, and you probably have noticed that there are more offline channel and points of sales available. So, these are continuous effort to both expand with these, both user growth and user engagement are really priorities, as we scale the learning device business. I would also say, operational efficiency. Look as revenue scales, will leverage economies of scale, or refine cost structures and optimize operations to drive healthy and efficient business growth.
pairs.zh:
我认为我们一直在加强分销和营销，以覆盖更多用户，同时深化与现有客户的互动。两者都至关重要，你可能已经注意到，我们在之前的电话会议中也讨论过这一点。从市场推广来看，我们关注不同的渠道形式，你可能已经发现，线下渠道和销售点正在增多。因此，这些都是持续的努力，随着学习设备业务的规模化，用户增长和用户参与度都是重中之重。我还要提一下运营效率。随着收入规模扩大，我们将利用规模经济，优化成本结构和运营，以推动健康且高效的业务增长。

I think we've been enhancing our distribution, our marketing to reach more users while deepening engagement with existing customers. Both are very crucial and you probably have seen and we've discussed this in on previous calls. When we look at the go-to-market, we look across different channel formats, and you probably have noticed that there are more offline channel and points of sales available. So, these are continuous effort to both expand with these, both user growth and user engagement are really priorities, as we scale the learning device business. I would also say, operational efficiency. Look as revenue scales, will leverage economies of scale, or refine cost structures and optimize operations to drive healthy and efficient business growth.

pairs.en: I think, while I said it's new for just two years, I think we've gained experience across all these dimensions to really drive further operational efficiency gains. So, in summary, we view this as a multi-year capability building, where every initiative was really designed to build sustainable competitiveness and pave the way for both future growth and profitability. So, Timothy, I hope that answered your question.
pairs.zh:
我认为，虽然我说这只开展了两年的时间，但我们已经在这些方面积累了经验，能够真正推动运营效率的进一步提升。因此，总的来说，我们将此视为多年的能力建设，每一项举措都旨在构建可持续的竞争力，并为未来的增长和盈利铺平道路。Timothy，希望这回答了你的问题。

I think, while I said it's new for just two years, I think we've gained experience across all these dimensions to really drive further operational efficiency gains. So, in summary, we view this as a multi-year capability building, where every initiative was really designed to build sustainable competitiveness and pave the way for both future growth and profitability. So, Timothy, I hope that answered your question.

pairs.en: Operator:Thank you. Our next question comes from the line of Sophie Zhang from CICC. Please go ahead, Sophie.
pairs.zh:
主持人：谢谢。下一位提问者是来自中金公司的Sophie Zhang。请讲，Sophie。

Operator: Thank you. Our next question comes from the line of Sophie Zhang from CICC. Please go ahead, Sophie.

pairs.en: Sophie Zhang:Good evening, Alex and Jackson. Thanks for taking my question. Could you please break down the top-line growth by business line for the past quarter to help us better understand the respective drivers? And also, could you elaborate on what led to the year-over-year decline in operating profit and what were the key reasons behind the growth in sales and marketing spend? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
Sophie Zhang:晚上好，Alex和Jackson。感谢你们回答我的问题。能否详细说明上一季度各业务线的营收增长情况，帮助我们更好地理解各自的驱动因素？另外，能否解释一下导致营业利润同比下降的原因，以及销售和营销支出增长背后的关键因素？谢谢。

Sophie Zhang:Good evening, Alex and Jackson. Thanks for taking my question. Could you please break down the top-line growth by business line for the past quarter to help us better understand the respective drivers? And also, could you elaborate on what led to the year-over-year decline in operating profit and what were the key reasons behind the growth in sales and marketing spend? Thank you.

pairs.en: Jackson Ding:Sophie, thanks for the question. This is Jackson. Let me take this one, and let me maybe unpack this question a little bit. I think you asked both about top-line and bottom-line. So, let me address top line performance first. Similar to last quarter, our Peiyou Small Class Enrichment programs remain both the largest revenue contributor and the primary growth driver within our learning services business line. Meanwhile, Learning Devices continue to be the largest revenue contributor within Content Solutions, while also serving as a key growth driver. So, let me maybe add additional color on these two businesses. Peiyou Enrichment delivered solid quarter-over-quarter and year-over-year growth this quarter and this year.
pairs.zh:
Jackson Ding: Sophie，感谢你的提问。我是Jackson，让我来回答这个问题，或许先稍微拆解一下。我认为你同时问到了营收和利润两个方面。那么我先谈谈营收表现。与上季度类似，我们的Peiyou Small Class Enrichment programs依然是学习服务业务线中最大的收入贡献者和主要增长驱动。与此同时，Learning Devices仍然是Content Solutions中最大的收入贡献者，同时也是关键的增长驱动力。那么我来为这两项业务补充一些细节。Peiyou Enrichment在本季度和本年度实现了稳健的环比和同比增长。

Jackson Ding:Sophie, thanks for the question. This is Jackson. Let me take this one, and let me maybe unpack this question a little bit. I think you asked both about top-line and bottom-line. So, let me address top line performance first. Similar to last quarter, our Peiyou Small Class Enrichment programs remain both the largest revenue contributor and the primary growth driver within our learning services business line. Meanwhile, Learning Devices continue to be the largest revenue contributor within Content Solutions, while also serving as a key growth driver. pairs.en: While we now operate from a significantly higher baseline than in prior years, which, as Alex talked about, will naturally moderate year-over-year growth rate over time. We expect continued expansion in this business supported by expanding market demand and our enhanced product capabilities. Learning Devices saw a sequential fourth quarter decline quarter-over-quarter, reflecting typical seasonality after a peak in Q3 due to e-commerce festivals. However, this business remained healthy, when we look at year-over-year growth, underscoring the businesses' momentum. When we look at full year fiscal 2025, both Learning Services and Content Solutions delivered year-over-year a stable business mix relative to fiscal 2024. Now, Sophie, let me adjust the second part of your question on margin profile.
pairs.zh:
虽然我们当前的运营基数相比前几年显著提高——正如Alex所说，这自然会随着时间推移使同比增速趋于缓和——但我们预计，在市场需求的持续扩大和产品能力的增强推动下，该业务将继续保持增长。Learning Devices经历了第四季度环比下降，这反映了在第三季度因电商节庆达到峰值后的典型季节性特征。然而，从同比数据来看，该业务依然健康，凸显了其增长势头。纵观2025财年全年，与2024财年相比，Learning Services和Content Solutions的业务组合保持稳定。现在，Sophie，我来调整你第二个关于利润率情况的问题。

While we now operate from a significantly higher baseline than in prior years, which, as Alex talked about, will naturally moderate year-over-year growth rate over time. We expect continued expansion in this business supported by expanding market demand and our enhanced product capabilities. Learning Devices saw a sequential fourth quarter decline quarter-over-quarter, reflecting typical seasonality after a peak in Q3 due to e-commerce festivals. However, this business remained healthy, when we look at year-over-year growth, underscoring the businesses' momentum. When we look at full year fiscal 2025, both Learning Services and Content Solutions delivered year-over-year a stable business mix relative to fiscal 2024. Now, Sophie, let me adjust the second part of your question on margin profile.

pairs.en: Maybe let's look at first general and administrative expenses. Non-GAAP G&A expenses have decreased from 24.4% to 17.8% this quarter, demonstrating leverage achieved through a larger revenue base. However, as you touched on, non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses rose to 35.1% of revenue, up 7.1 percentage points year-over-year and that's primarily due to increased activities in online channels aimed at market penetrations and product visibility enhancements. That was the main reason for year-over-year decline in our adjusted operating margin. Additionally, we conducted brand building initiatives that it may not yield immediate revenue, but are expected to promote customer awareness and our market positioning. As part of our strategy, we're committed to establishing and strengthening multi-channel communication mechanisms with our users.
pairs.zh:
我们先来看一下一般及行政费用。非GAAP一般及行政费用本季度从24.4%下降至17.8%，这反映了通过扩大收入基础实现的杠杆效应。但正如您提到的，非GAAP销售与营销费用上升至收入的35.1%，同比增加了7.1个百分点，这主要是由于在线渠道活动增加，旨在提升市场渗透率和产品知名度。这是调整后运营利润率同比下降的主要原因。此外，我们还开展了品牌建设活动，这些活动可能不会立即产生收入，但预计能提升客户认知度和我们的市场定位。作为战略的一部分，我们致力于建立和加强与用户的多渠道沟通机制。

Maybe let's look at first general and administrative expenses. Non-GAAP G&A expenses have decreased from 24.4% to 17.8% this quarter, demonstrating leverage achieved through a larger revenue base. However, as you touched on, non-GAAP selling and marketing expenses rose to 35.1% of revenue, up 7.1 percentage points year-over-year and that's primarily due to increased activities in online channels aimed at market penetrations and product visibility enhancements. That was the main reason for year-over-year decline in our adjusted operating margin. Additionally, we conducted brand building initiatives that it may not yield immediate revenue, but are expected to promote customer awareness and our market positioning. As part of our strategy, we're committed to establishing and strengthening multi-channel communication mechanisms with our users.

pairs.en: For digital products such as Learning Devices and shares.com, these efforts are crucial in fostering deep customer engagement, reaching more users, and gaining broader acceptance. Looking ahead, we're refining our market approach and diversifying our channels to align with business maturity, product cycles, and market conditions. Through this process, we aim to steadily strengthen our channel capabilities, enhance brand recognition, and deepen connections with the next generation of parents and learners. We believe that by upgrading our channel strategies, diversifying our distribution networks, and driving user engagement will drive long-term business growth. I hope that answers your question.
pairs.zh:
对于像Learning Devices和shares.com这样的数字产品，这些努力在促进深度客户参与、触达更多用户以及获得更广泛认可方面至关重要。展望未来，我们正在优化市场策略并多样化渠道，以匹配业务成熟度、产品周期和市场状况。通过这一过程，我们旨在稳步增强渠道能力、提升品牌认知，并加深与新一代家长和学习者的联系。我们相信，升级渠道策略、多样化分销网络并推动用户参与将驱动长期业务增长。希望这回答了您的问题。

For digital products such as Learning Devices and shares.com, these efforts are crucial in fostering deep customer engagement, reaching more users, and gaining broader acceptance. Looking ahead, we're refining our market approach and diversifying our channels to align with business maturity, product cycles, and market conditions. Through this process, we aim to steadily strengthen our channel capabilities, enhance brand recognition, and deepen connections with the next generation of parents and learners. We believe that by upgrading our channel strategies, diversifying our distribution networks, and driving user engagement will drive long-term business growth. I hope that answers your question.

pairs.en: Sophie Zhang:Thank you, Jackson, and that's very helpful. So just a quick follow-up on the bottom line. So, should we expect improvement in profitability going forward? Thank you.
pairs.zh:
Sophie Zhang：谢谢你，Jackson，这非常有帮助。所以只是快速跟进一下底线问题。那么，我们是否应该预期未来盈利能力会有所改善？谢谢。

Sophie Zhang:Thank you, Jackson, and that's very helpful. So just a quick follow-up on the bottom line. So, should we expect improvement in profitability going forward? Thank you.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Sophie, thanks, and that's a good question. I would say moving forward, improving overall profitability remains a key priority for us. As our business continues to develop, we expect two primary drivers of profitability. First, our expanding revenue base naturally generates our operating leverage, which will allow for more efficient allocation of fixed cost, and you can probably see that in some of the financial results we printed in the last few quarters, right? We continue to unlock our operating leverage as our business grow, and general, for example, general and administrative expenses as a percentage of revenue has largely come down in the last few quarters.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng: Sophie，谢谢，这是个好问题。我想说，展望未来，提高整体盈利能力仍是我们的关键优先事项。随着业务持续发展，我们预计盈利能力将有两个主要驱动力。首先，不断扩大的收入基础自然会产生经营杠杆，这将使固定成本更有效地分配，你可能已经在我们过去几个季度公布的一些财务业绩中看到了这一点，对吧？随着业务增长，我们持续释放经营杠杆，例如，一般及行政开支占收入的比例在过去几个季度已大幅下降。

Alex Peng:Sophie, thanks, and that's a good question. I would say moving forward, improving overall profitability remains a key priority for us. As our business continues to develop, we expect two primary drivers of profitability. First, our expanding revenue base naturally generates our operating leverage, which will allow for more efficient allocation of fixed cost, and you can probably see that in some of the financial results we printed in the last few quarters, right? We continue to unlock our operating leverage as our business grow, and general, for example, general and administrative expenses as a percentage of revenue has largely come down in the last few quarters.

pairs.en: Our profitability would be, us implementing targeted operational refinements at every stage of our workflow. This includes content creation, product R&D, service delivery, and sales and marketing, right? While these efforts will take a bit of time to fully impact our P&L, I would just like to reiterate again that operating efficiency will remain a priority for us in the next fiscal year. I hope that answers your question, Sophie.
pairs.zh:
我们的盈利能力将来自于我们在工作流程的每一个阶段实施有针对性的运营优化。这包括内容创作、产品研发、服务交付以及销售和市场推广，对吧？虽然这些努力需要一些时间才能完全体现在我们的损益表上，但我想再次重申，运营效率仍将是我们在下一财年的优先事项。希望这能回答你的问题，Sophie。

Felix Liu：晚上好，管理层。感谢您回答我的问题。我的问题是关于AI的。那么，管理层预计在短期内AI可以应用到哪些学习场景中？将DeepSeek整合到您的商业模式中，特别是在我们的学习服务和Learning Devices业务中，会带来哪些影响？谢谢。

Felix Liu:Good evening, management. Thank you for taking my question. My question is on AI. So, what learning scenarios does management anticipate that AI can be implemented to your business in the near-term? What are the impacts that integrating DeepSeek into your business model will present particularly in our learning services and the Learning Devices business? Thank you.

pairs.en: Alex Peng:Thanks, Felix, this is Alex. Let me take this one on. I will actually take a step back a little bit. We've been talking about the AI, and I just want to go back to something that I've discussed maybe a year or even two ago. I think it really has multi-dimensional impact on us, and look, we really welcome every single advance of this in AI capabilities from the foundational models. I think every single advance is welcoming use to us and let me explain why. So, first of all, we think AI has a huge, huge impact on educational content creation. The entire creation process is benefiting tremendously from AI.
pairs.zh:
Alex Peng：谢谢，Felix，我是Alex。我来回答这个问题。实际上，我想稍微退一步。我们一直在讨论AI，而我想回到大约一两年前我谈过的一个话题。我认为AI对我们有着多维度的深远影响，而且说实话，我们非常欢迎AI能力在基础模型方面的每一次进步。每一次进步对我们来说都是可喜的，让我解释一下原因。首先，我们认为AI对教育内容的创作产生了巨大的影响。整个创作过程正极大地受益于AI。

原文：
Alex Peng:Thanks, Felix, this is Alex. Let me take this one on. I will actually take a step back a little bit. We've been talking about the AI, and I just want to go back to something that I've discussed maybe a year or even two ago. I think it really has multi-dimensional impact on us, and look, we really welcome every single advance of this in AI capabilities from the foundational models. I think every single advance is welcoming use to us and let me explain why. So, first of all, we think AI has a huge, huge impact on educational content creation. The entire creation process is benefiting tremendously from AI.

pairs.en: I think number one, it has tremendous implication in terms of efficiency gain, in terms of speed gain, and we're witnessing that every single day in the last two years. I think that -- and it also by the way has made things that previously seemed impossible to be possible. Leveraging this capability, you can develop multi-language, multi-curriculum, adapted learning content material. So, I think that's just something that we didn't think was quite possible. I think we are getting very close to be able to use AI to generate interactive, high-quality content in real time. Again, that wasn't even a cost issue. I think that was just basically not possible before.
pairs.zh:
我认为第一点，它在效率提升和速度提升方面具有巨大影响，过去两年中我们每天都能见证这一点。而且，它还让一些以前看似不可能的事情变得可能。利用这种能力，你可以开发多语言、多课程、自适应学习内容材料。所以，我认为这是我们以前认为不太可能实现的事情。我们正在非常接近能够使用AI实时生成互动式、高质量的内容。再说一次，这甚至不是成本问题。我认为这在以前基本上是不可能实现的。

原文：
I think number one, it has tremendous implication in terms of efficiency gain, in terms of speed gain, and we're witnessing that every single day in the last two years. I think that -- and it also by the way has made things that previously seemed impossible to be possible. Leveraging this capability, you can develop multi-language, multi-curriculum, adapted learning content material. So, I think that's just something that we didn't think was quite possible. I think we are getting very close to be able to use AI to generate interactive, high-quality content in real time. Again, that wasn't even a cost issue. I think that was just basically not possible before.

pairs.en: So, these, I think, offer really raising up the top the ceiling of what's possible while doing it, it was a tremendously different cost structure than before, right? So, I think that's just the first thing I want to really lock with everybody on the call. I think look, secondly, with every single advance of AI, we just see more possibilities of leveraging on service, it goes from instruction, to customer service to after sales service and across the board. I think in these areas, again, we have -- it's not even the possibility. I think we're pushing those every day in terms of both raising the level of customer service, while gaining more efficiency.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为这些技术真正提升了可能性的上限，同时实现这一切的成本结构与以往截然不同，对吧？所以，我想这是我在电话会议上想跟大家强调的第一点。其次，随着AI的每一次进步，我们都能看到更多利用服务的可能性，从指令到客户服务、售后服务，贯穿各个领域。我认为在这些领域，我们再次——这甚至不只是可能性。我认为我们每天都在推动这些事情，在提升客户服务水平的同时，获得更高的效率。

So, these, I think, offer really raising up the top the ceiling of what's possible while doing it, it was a tremendously different cost structure than before, right? So, I think that's just the first thing I want to really lock with everybody on the call. I think look, secondly, with every single advance of AI, we just see more possibilities of leveraging on service, it goes from instruction, to customer service to after sales service and across the board. I think in these areas, again, we have -- it's not even the possibility. I think we're pushing those every day in terms of both raising the level of customer service, while gaining more efficiency.

pairs.en: So, I think that's also been tremendously helpful. And again, I think we're just expecting more, as the capability of AI, it gets even more obvious. I think number three in terms of research and development, we're really seeing so much more code generated by AI, that is advancing speed, gaining efficiency, we are a large research and development and education technology, and I think AI is really giving us a very different way of developing this. It's faster. It's nimble. It's you get very fast prototyping, and you get more efficiency not only from using AI to code by itself, but that nimble and fast prototyping is actually removing a lot of friction in the R&D process versus before.
pairs.zh:
所以，我认为这也非常有帮助。而且，我认为我们期待更多，因为AI的能力变得更加明显。第三，在研发方面，我们确实看到由AI生成的代码越来越多，这提升了速度，提高了效率。我们是一家大型研发与教育技术公司，我认为AI确实为我们提供了一种非常不同的开发方式。它更快、更灵活。你可以快速进行原型设计，不仅通过使用AI本身来编码获得更高效率，而且这种灵活快速的原型设计实际上消除了研发过程中的许多摩擦，与过去相比。

So, I think that's also been tremendously helpful. And again, I think we're just expecting more, as the capability of AI, it gets even more obvious. I think number three in terms of research and development, we're really seeing so much more code generated by AI, that is advancing speed, gaining efficiency, we are a large research and development and education technology, and I think AI is really giving us a very different way of developing this. It's faster. It's nimble. It's you get very fast prototyping, and you get more efficiency not only from using AI to code by itself, but that nimble and fast prototyping is actually removing a lot of friction in the R&D process versus before.

pairs.en: I just want to log those three. Those are things that we probably didn't discuss in a whole other detail in the last few calls, but I think those are actually very tangible, meaningful, and we expect more benefit, and more impact from those. So, if going back to the integration in learning scenarios, look, I think we're increasingly seeing AI becoming, a learning companion. I think the shelf to chat assistant, that really embodies that fact that it is there. More and more students who are native in this AI age are getting comfortable to get on the spot help and learning support from AI as they learn.
pairs.zh:
我只想记录这三项。这些是我们在前几次通话中可能没有详细讨论过的，但我认为它们实际上非常具体、有意义，我们期望从中获得更多收益和更大影响。那么，回到学习场景中的整合，我认为我们越来越多地看到AI成为一种学习伴侣。我认为从shelf到chat assistant，这确实体现了它就在那里的事实。越来越多的原生AI时代的学生在学习过程中越来越习惯于从AI那里获得即时帮助和学习支持。

I just want to log those three. Those are things that we probably didn't discuss in a whole other detail in the last few calls, but I think those are actually very tangible, meaningful, and we expect more benefit, and more impact from those. So, if going back to the integration in learning scenarios, look, I think we're increasingly seeing AI becoming, a learning companion. I think the shelf to chat assistant, that really embodies that fact that it is there. More and more students who are native in this AI age are getting comfortable to get on the spot help and learning support from AI as they learn.

pairs.en: So, currently, DeepSeek V3 service is one of the foundational models for our Mass GPT or in Chinese. Beyond its general intelligence capabilities, we've also finding that on learning content, enhancing its ability to support really subject specific tasks. And also, let me add this. I think we need to fine-tune it and to support those pedagogical scenarios. For our model to be able to produce the answer is one thing.
pairs.zh:
那么，目前，DeepSeek V3服务是我们Mass GPT（中文名）的基础模型之一。除了其通用智能能力外，我们还发现它在学习内容方面能够增强对特定学科任务的支持能力。另外，我再补充一点：我认为我们需要对其进行微调，以支持这些教学场景。让我们的模型能够生成答案是一回事。

So, currently, DeepSeek V3 service is one of the foundational models for our Mass GPT or in Chinese. Beyond its general intelligence capabilities, we've also finding that on learning content, enhancing its ability to support really subject specific tasks. And also, let me add this. I think we need to fine-tune it and to support those pedagogical scenarios. For our model to be able to produce the answer is one thing.

pairs.en: For it to be able to actually make the solution more accessible, easier to understand, liked by students, these are actually, we believe are fundamentally vertical capabilities to an education player and that's how we look at it, that we're going to continue to work and invest on those, really lowering the barrier to accessing these AI capabilities, improving the user interface, making it easier for user to provide their input to the large language model, but also working really hard to make the output from AI, not the raw straight output from these large language models, but make the output a learning purpose and serve it well.
pairs.zh:
要真正让解决方案更容易获得、更易于理解、受到学生喜爱，我们认为这些本质上是一家教育公司应具备的垂直能力，这也是我们的看法。我们将继续努力并投入这些方面，真正降低使用这些AI能力的门槛，改进用户界面，让用户更轻松地向大型语言模型提供输入，同时也在努力让AI的输出不是这些大型语言模型直接给出的原始结果，而是使其具有学习目的并很好地服务用户。

原文：For it to be able to actually make the solution more accessible, easier to understand, liked by students, these are actually, we believe are fundamentally vertical capabilities to an education player and that's how we look at it, that we're going to continue to work and invest on those, really lowering the barrier to accessing these AI capabilities, improving the user interface, making it easier for user to provide their input to the large language model, but also working really hard to make the output from AI, not the raw straight output from these large language models, but make the output a learning purpose and serve it well.

pairs.en: And lastly, I would just say, look, we'll also remain committed to contributing to the broader intelligent learning ecosystem, advancing new educational paradigms, supporting future schools and third-party institutions, as we've done in the past and we really look forward to reimagining the future of learning, and shape a more dynamic for thinking education ecosystem as a whole. Felix, I hope that answered your question.
pairs.zh:
最后，我想说，我们也将继续致力于推动更广泛智能学习生态系统的发展，推进新的教育模式，支持未来学校和第三方机构，就像我们过去所做的那样。我们非常期待重新构想学习的未来，共同塑造一个更有活力的思维教育生态系统。Felix，希望这回答了你的问题。

And lastly, I would just say, look, we'll also remain committed to contributing to the broader intelligent learning ecosystem, advancing new educational paradigms, supporting future schools and third-party institutions, as we've done in the past and we really look forward to reimagining the future of learning, and shape a more dynamic for thinking education ecosystem as a whole. Felix, I hope that answered your question.

pairs.en: Alice Tsai:Thanks management for taking my question. How are we considering cash usage? Could you please give us more color about the future investment strategy and also shareholder returns? Thank you so much.

Alice Tsai:感谢管理层接受我的提问。我们如何考虑现金使用？能否请您进一步说明未来的投资策略以及股东回报？非常感谢。

原文：Alice Tsai:Thanks management for taking my question. How are we considering cash usage? Could you please give us more color about the future investment strategy and also shareholder returns? Thank you so much.

pairs.en: Jackson Ding:Alice, thank you for the question. This is Jackson. Let me take this one. Let me maybe first address our current cash position. As of February 28, 2025, the company holds approximately $3.2 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments and restricted cash, while excluding deferred revenue. Given our cash position, we think we're well-positioned to fund both growth and returns. When it comes to deploying this capital, very much like how we do a lot of things, we take a thoughtful and balanced approach when evaluating potential uses of cash. We consider multiple factors to strike the right balance between short-term needs and long-term development.
pairs.zh:
Jackson Ding：Alice，谢谢你的提问。我是Jackson，我来回答这个问题。首先，我想谈谈我们当前的现金状况。截至2025年2月28日，公司持有约32亿美元现金、现金等价物、短期投资及受限资金（不含递延收入）。基于我们的现金储备，我们认为自身具备充足能力为业务增长和股东回报提供资金支持。在资本配置方面，正如我们处理诸多事务的方式一样，我们在评估资金使用方案时会采取审慎且平衡的策略。我们会综合考虑多重因素，在短期需求与长期发展之间找到最佳平衡点。

Jackson Ding:Alice, thank you for the question. This is Jackson. Let me take this one. Let me maybe first address our current cash position. As of February 28, 2025, the company holds approximately $3.2 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments and restricted cash, while excluding deferred revenue. Given our cash position, we think we're well-positioned to fund both growth and returns. We consider multiple factors to strike the right balance between short-term needs and long-term development.

pairs.en: Our focus remains on optimizing resource allocation, reinvesting strategically into the business, while also delivering value to shareholders. Given our current margin profile, which remains relatively thin, and with a meaningful portion of our operations and businesses still in growth phases, maintaining operational flexibility is one of our key priorities. As we assess investment opportunities for fiscal 2026, we're particularly interested in areas that enhance our existing products and services, strengthening our core capabilities, and support business expansion. Additionally, as our industry evolves and new technologies emerge, we'll invest in integrating these advancements into our operations. We believe these investments will drive long-term value creation for our shareholders. Alongside of these investments, we remain equally focused on shareholder returns.
pairs.zh:
我们的重点仍然是优化资源配置、战略性再投资于业务，同时为股东创造价值。鉴于我们目前的利润率仍然相对较薄，且相当一部分运营和业务仍处于增长阶段，保持运营灵活性是我们的关键优先事项之一。在评估2026财年的投资机会时，我们特别关注那些能提升现有产品和服务、强化核心能力、支持业务扩张的领域。此外，随着行业发展和新技术的出现，我们将投资于将这些进步整合到我们的运营中。我们相信这些投资将为股东创造长期价值。在投资的同时，我们同样关注股东回报。

Our focus remains on optimizing resource allocation, reinvesting strategically into the business, while also delivering value to shareholders. Given our current margin profile, which remains relatively thin, and with a meaningful portion of our operations and businesses still in growth phases, maintaining operational flexibility is one of our key priorities. As we assess investment opportunities for fiscal 2026, we're particularly interested in areas that enhance our existing products and services, strengthening our core capabilities, and support business expansion. Additionally, as our industry evolves and new technologies emerge, we'll invest in integrating these advancements into our operations. We believe these investments will drive long-term value creation for our shareholders. Alongside of these investments, we remain equally focused on shareholder returns.

pairs.en: As previously mentioned, the Board has extended our share repurchase program for an additional year, authorizing purchases of up to $490.7 million. Going forward, we'll prudently evaluate market to really serve a learning purpose and that to enhance our services. We're a very large services provider. Our touch base with customers on service market conditions, our business needs, and other relevant factors, before executing further repurchases. So, to summarize, our philosophy centers around a disciplined, forward-looking approach, one that fosters sustainable development while maintaining the agility needed to navigate this dynamic market, and we'll keep you guys posted as appropriate. I hope that answers your question, Alice.
pairs.zh:
如前所述，董事会已将我们的股票回购计划延长一年，授权购买高达4.907亿美元。未来，我们将审慎评估市场，切实服务于学习目的并提升我们的服务。我们是一家非常大型的服务提供商。在执行进一步回购之前，我们会与客户就服务市场状况、我们的业务需求及其他相关因素保持联系。总之，我们的理念围绕严谨且前瞻性的方法，既促进可持续发展，又保持驾驭动态市场所需的灵活性，我们会适时向各位通报进展。希望这回答了你的问题，Alice。

As previously mentioned, the Board has extended our share repurchase program for an additional year, authorizing purchases of up to $490.7 million. Going forward, we'll prudently evaluate market to really serve a learning purpose and that to enhance our services. We're a very large services provider. Our touch base with customers on service market conditions, our business needs, and other relevant factors, before executing further repurchases. So, to summarize, our philosophy centers around a disciplined, forward-looking approach, one that fosters sustainable development while maintaining the agility needed to navigate this dynamic market, and we'll keep you guys posted as appropriate. I hope that answers your question, Alice.
